name: Spicy Tofu with Green Vegetables & Noodles
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Tofu, pressed and cut into 1/4-inch slices
Sauce: 1 tbsp Soy sauce, 1 tbsp Sesame oil, 1/2 tsp Chili garlic sauce, 1 tbsp Cornstarch dissolved in 2 tbsp Water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine all the marinade ingredients and marinate the tofu for about 15 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, slice all the vegetables as listed above and prepare the sauce by combining its ingredients in another small mixing bowl.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a wok and fry the marinated tofu until golden on all sides. Remove and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
4. Stir-fry the vegetables in the order they appear, being careful not to overcook them.
5. At the last minute, pour the sauce over the cooked vegetables and add the tofu. Mix gently.
6. Serve over Oriental noodles or rice.
